name: aura-ed-platform
description: Aura-Ed monorepo foundation for UAE-focused inclusive adaptive learning

scripts.dev:adaptive: echo "Run adaptive engine with: uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8010"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/web-next && npm run build --workspace services/api-gateway && npm run build --workspace packages/shared-types
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web-next && npm run typecheck --workspace services/api-gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared-types
